channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-04-14 02:30 — Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band at Chase Center. Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band are legendary performers with a storied career, making this a must-see event.

item.title: Jackson Wang @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-04-03 03:00 — Jackson Wang at Oakland Arena. Jackson Wang is a rising star in pop music with a strong global following, promising a vibrant live show.

item.title: LANY @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-04 02:30 — LANY at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. LANY's dreamy pop sound and strong fan engagement make their shows a captivating experience.

item.title: The Strokes @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-07 02:30 — The Strokes at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Strokes are iconic in the indie rock scene, known for their electrifying live performances.

item.title: FKA twigs @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-08 03:00 — FKA twigs at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. FKA twigs is celebrated for her innovative performances and unique sound, making this a standout event.

item.title: Sticky Fingers @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-04-07 03:00 — Sticky Fingers at The Masonic. Sticky Fingers brings a fresh blend of rock and reggae, known for their energetic live shows.

item.title: Goldie Boutilier @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-30 03:00 — Goldie Boutilier at August Hall. Rich Amiri is gaining traction in the hip-hop scene, and his performance promises to be engaging.

item.title: Sarah Kinsley @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-31 03:00 — Sarah Kinsley at August Hall. Sarah Kinsley's indie-pop sound is resonating with audiences, making her show a noteworthy pick.

item.title: Juvenile @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-06-25 03:00 — Juvenile at Fox Theater - Oakland. Juvenile's return with the 400 Degreez Band is a nostalgic draw for hip-hop fans.

item.title: The Maine @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-03-30 01:30 — The Maine at The Regency Ballroom. The Maine's pop-rock sound and engaging performances make them a solid choice for fans of the genre.

item.title: The Early November @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-02 02:30 — The Early November at August Hall. The Early November's nostalgic sound resonates with fans of early 2000s emo and pop-punk.

item.title: Rene Liu @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Rene Liu at SAP Center at San Jose. Kid Cudi's innovative approach to hip-hop and engaging performances make his tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Alabama Shakes @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-30 03:00 → 2026-05-31 03:00 — Alabama Shakes at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Alabama Shakes' soulful sound and dynamic performances make them a must-see act.

item.title: Dave @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-01 03:00 — Dave at Fox Theater - Oakland. Dave's tour showcases his unique blend of hip-hop and storytelling, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: VNV Nation @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-27 02:30 — VNV Nation at August Hall. VNV Nation's electronic music is known for its powerful live performances, appealing to fans of the genre.

item.title: Nick Lowe @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-04-01 03:00 — Nick Lowe at The Castro Theatre. Nick Lowe's legacy in rock and pop makes his performance a compelling choice for music lovers.

item.title: Los Tucanes De Tijuana @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-27 01:00 — Los Tucanes De Tijuana at Oakland Arena. Lamb of God's heavy sound and intense live shows attract a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-13 01:30 — The Pussycat Dolls at Shoreline Amphitheatre. The Pussycat Dolls' reunion tour is a nostalgic draw for fans of early 2000s pop.

item.title: Escape the Fate Vip @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-04-08 00:00 — Escape the Fate Vip at The Fillmore .
